case_title: HAURY PROPERTIES VIII, LLC VS. MARWOOD ASSETS MANAGEMENT, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: - JUDGMENT CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER HAURY PROPERTIES VIII, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. ALL RESPONDENTS FILED NOTICES OF NON-OPPOSITION. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Neil A.F. Popovic of Sheppard Mullin (415-774-3156) appears as counsel for respondent/non-opposing party, Bayshire Group, Inc.

No other appearance is made in this matter

The matter is called for hearing. Court finds no opposition present. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER HAURY PROPERTIES VIII, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is GRANTED. All respondents filed notices of non-opposition. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)
